steps.title: Link reprogramming to purpose
steps.content: The main action is that Charpentier and Doudna re-created and reprogrammed the genetic scissors. The phrase after the blank names the tool produced by that action, so the blank should express purpose or result.

steps.title: Reject unparallel forms
steps.content: Choice B uses a participle where the sentence needs a clear purpose link. Choice C creates an awkward past-participle attachment. Choice D breaks parallel structure by joining a participle to past-tense verbs. The infinitive to forge is idiomatic here. The answer is A.
